_comment: Append-only log of minted mistake-ids from behavior:18-log-mistake. Read by cli-tool:propose-mistake to promote frequently-minted mistakes into data/mistake-taxonomy.json. Format per line: {"learner": "<username>", "mistake_id": "mistake:<slug>", "label": "<short>", "sample_context": "<one-line>", "timestamp": "<iso8601>"}. This file intentionally seeded with this comment-only entry so the path exists on disk for graph health checks.
